contactModal.title: Contact us
contactModal.description: For enterprise partnerships, data licensing, technical support, or plan enquiries, email us:

cookieBanner.title: Cookie settings
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and secure, and analytics cookies to improve the product. We never use them for ad tracking.

hero.title: A Taiwan market data API built for systems and quant workflows
hero.subhead1: A consistent Taiwan stock data API for AI agents, automation, and quantitative research.
hero.subhead2: Centered on TWSE-listed data, with verified datasets that clearly state their coverage window, sources, and limits.

infra.heading: Taiwan market data infrastructure
infra.subheading: Sourced from official providers and shaped into a stable, queryable, traceable API.

twseFirst.label: Verified baseline
twseFirst.description: Centered on listed-market data, expanding coverage to other markets over time.

lowLatency.label: Built for API & agent workflows
lowLatency.description: Tuned for automated queries and research pipelines, with a continually improved read path.

officialFirst.label: Lineage & data gaps preserved
officialFirst.description: Prioritizes TWSE, TPEx, MOPS, and official public sources — no mixed provenance.

clearBoundary.label: No overclaiming
clearBoundary.description: No claims of full-market, adjusted prices, survivorship-safety, or investment advice.

finalCta.heading: Get started
finalCta.body1: From prices and financials to corporate events, connect to the Taiwan market data API in minutes.
finalCta.body2: After signing up you can choose a plan, create your own API keys, and get data access and usage quota by plan.

aiAgentWorkflow.title: AI agent workflow
aiAgentWorkflow.intro: From task planning to reliable data retrieval — built for AI agent and quant workflows, so data is verifiable, traceable, and programmatically usable.
aiAgentWorkflow.step1Description: The AI agent parses the user's question and plans the required data and metrics.
aiAgentWorkflow.step2Title: Find the right dataset and fields
aiAgentWorkflow.step2Description: Use the data catalog and schema to select the exact dataset and fields.
aiAgentWorkflow.step3Title: Call the API to retrieve data
aiAgentWorkflow.step3Description: Retrieve data through a standardized API; responses include source and lineage.
aiAgentWorkflow.step4Description: Check freshness, source tier, and field completeness to ensure reliability.
aiAgentWorkflow.step5Description: Compute metrics, engineer features, or run analysis to produce traceable conclusions.
aiAgentWorkflow.step6Description: Return results while retaining source, timestamp, and lineage — verifiable and auditable.
aiAgentWorkflow.footnote: Traceable, verifiable, and programmatic — built for agent workflows.

agentWorkflowShowcase.title: Let AI agents read traceable Taiwan stock data directly
agentWorkflowShowcase.description: Wire prices, financials, and disclosures into your agent workflow. A consistent response structure with source_role / lineage keeps the data both readable and verifiable.

agentDocumentsShowcase.title: Give AI agents direct understanding of filings and financial reports
agentDocumentsShowcase.description: Turn material announcements, filings, and financial-statement notes into analyzable text context, so agents don't just read the numbers — they understand what a company actually disclosed.

marketCoverage.heading: Query across TWSE- and TPEx-listed stocks, ETFs, warrants, and more
marketCoverage.description: Covers the Taiwan market's main data themes — prices, financial statements, operating metrics, and corporate events. Supports queries across stocks, time, and multiple datasets, so agents can run analysis and screening in a single data layer. Positioned publicly as a TWSE-first verified baseline; makes no claim to full-market historical coverage.

apiDemo.heading: Clean, direct Taiwan stock market data API
apiDemo.description: Consistent endpoints and response formats to quickly integrate market quotes, financial statements, revenue, and event data into your systems.

sourceOfTruth.heading: A single trusted source of truth
sourceOfTruth.description: Sample data topics currently at the public boundary. The public scope uses a TWSE-first verified baseline; TPEx historical coverage, adjusted prices, and a survivorship-safe universe remain deferred / in-progress.

agentDocumentsDemo.pulling: Agent: pulling company filings and financial notes

pricing.title: Pricing

selfServe.instantDesc: Pay online and your API key is issued immediately — no contract, no waiting for a sales callback.
selfServe.cancelDesc: Turn off any monthly plan from your account page — no lock-in, no cancellation fee.
selfServe.selfDesc: Sign up, get a key, watch usage, upgrade — all self-service; reach us only when you need to.

pricing.annualCheckoutNote: Annual checkout is coming soon; to start now, switch to monthly.
pricing.checkoutError: Checkout can't open right now — please try again later or contact us.
pricing.cardRecurringNote: Recurring card billing; cancel anytime from the Customer Portal on the billing page.
pricing.enterpriseNote: Enterprise / custom: standard plans can be paid by card directly; contact us for dedicated quota, invoicing, or an SLA.
pricing.notAdvice: This service provides data APIs, tools, and documentation — not investment advice, stock recommendations, or trading signals.
pricing.comparisonIntro: See each plan's dataset scope and history depth at a glance. Full dataset list in the <catalog>dataset catalog</catalog>; each dataset's actual coverage and update status follow <coverage>docs coverage</coverage> (we don't fabricate per-cell coverage numbers).
pricing.comparisonFootnote: Note: TPEx daily history depth is still deferred; adjusted prices, a survivorship-safe universe, and a backtest-grade full-market baseline are not within our current publicly-claimable scope.

rows.financialStatements: Financial statements (income / balance sheet / cash flow)
